features: ✨️【Quality Material】Dalababa sequin hair bobbles are made of premium polyester fiber and can be used for a long time. They have a certain elasticity and are comfortable to wear.

✨️【Sequin Design】These hair scrunchies are designed with square sequins, they create a stunning sparkling effect by reflecting the light, bringing out the retro atmosphere for disco themed parties and gatherings.
✨️【Large Size】The outer diameter of the hair scruhbchies is about 10cm/3.9nch, the width of the fabric is about 3.5cm/1.37inch. Suitable for most people, for any length of hair, thick or thin hair.

✨️【High Elasticity】Inner built-in a strong elastic band which can withstand thousands of pulls without losing elasticity and doesn't break easily for durability. Strong enough elastic band is suitable for normal, thick, thin, fine, long, straight, curly and more hairs.

✨️【Wide Application】Disco hair ties make it easy to put your hair up in a bun or ponytail. Our metallic ponytail holders are suitable for a variety of occasions, not only for daily hair styling but also for disco theme parties, concerts, festivals, bar etc. Suitable for yourself or your mother, girlfriend, children etc.
